title: Set up Liveblocks real-time collaboration in a Next.js project
summary: Complete Liveblocks setup — authentication endpoint, presence (live cursors, online users), shared storage, and collaborative rich-text editing with Tiptap or Lexical.
declaration: I will set up Liveblocks for real-time collaboration features. Liveblocks provides presence (who is online, where their cursor is) and synchronized shared state with conflict-free resolution. For basic WebSocket without conflict-resolution, Socket.io is simpler — say so if you prefer that.
